scored.statedInsightEvidence: So 3/8 is three eighth-note beats, not a fourth count.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the tutor's step-by-step instructions to map the time signature components.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: draws an eighth note under each of the three tiles, stopping at the bar line
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully performs the task of drawing the correct note values corresponding to the new 3/8 time signature.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor maintains a consistent scaffolding strategy throughout the dialogue without needing to reverse or change course.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: No adaptive mechanism reversal occurs as the initial scaffolding strategy is successful.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.
